root_dir.description: Root directory the marathon scripts run from.

include.description: Glob patterns to include when finding marathon scripts. Takes precedence over excludes.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude when finding files.

deno_config.description: Path to a deno.json or deno.jsonc to pass as --config to every spawned script. Relative paths are resolved from root_dir. When unset, Marathon automatically looks for deno.json or deno.jsonc in root_dir.
